How It Works

3 Steps. The Doctor Never Sees Your Name.

The AI listens to you, the doctor only sees the case. Your name, phone, and email are never shared.

5,000+Prescriptions Verified
~20 minAverage Time
4.9★Patient Rating

Quick Login with Phone Number

No forms, no passwords. Just enter your phone number, receive an OTP — and you're in. Start in under 10 seconds.

  • No registration form required
  • Phone number only — OTP login
  • Transparent PKR pricing — no hidden charges

Chat Freely with AI

Describe your problem in a WhatsApp-like chat. The AI asks structured follow-up questions — private, non-judgmental, no human on the other side.

  • Urdu or English — speak freely
  • 100% private — no judgment
  • AI understands and builds your case

Verified Prescription in 15-20 Min

A doctor verifies your case within 15-20 minutes. Your prescription arrives on your phone — download as PDF, take to any pharmacy.

  • PDF format — download anytime
  • Valid at any pharmacy
  • PMDC doctor's seal and signature

What you receive:

PDF Prescription
Phone delivery
Pharmacy-ready format
In 15-20 min
Get Started

Sign in with phone · PMDC-verified doctors

Built for Pakistan

Healthcare That Speaks Your Language

AI-powered patient chat and a professional doctor dashboard — designed for how 220 million Pakistanis actually access care.

Chat in Any Language

Urdu, English, Roman Urdu — our AI understands you naturally. Full Nastaliq RTL support and voice messages included.

Guided Symptom Collection

Our AI asks structured follow-up questions to build a complete picture — like a real doctor's consultation, averaging 3–7 messages per session.

Family Profiles

Add parents, children, and grandparents — each with their own medical history and consultation records under one account.

Real-Time Notifications

Get instant alerts when your doctor reviews your case and approves your prescription. No waiting rooms, no queues.

PMDC Doctor Verification

Every doctor is verified against the PMDC registry. A licensed physician reviews your case and signs every prescription.

100% Anonymous

Chat without revealing your name or phone number. Bank-grade AES-256 encryption keeps your medical data completely private.

Ilaaj AI

Pakistan's first AI-powered health platform. Chat about your symptoms in any language, get AI triage, and receive doctor-verified prescriptions — affordable and accessible, 24/7.

© 2026 Ilaaj AI. All rights reserved.

Ilaaj AI is for general health consultations and non-emergency medical guidance. For emergencies, call 1122 (Rescue) or visit the nearest hospital.
